17.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
17.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch
hereby (-in, -with), it, likewise, the one (other, same), she, so (much), such (deed), that, therefore, these, this (thing), thus.

17.gl: Jehonathan, the name of four Israelites
Shaul, the name of an Edomite and two Israelites
David, the youngest son of Jesse
17.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

17.gl: to strike a musical note, i.e. chant or wail (at a funeral)

18.gl: properly, to goad, i.e. (by implication) to teach (the rod being an Oriental incentive)

18.gl: a bow, forshooting (hence, figuratively, strength) or the iris

19.gl: splendor (as conspicuous); also a gazelle (as beautiful)
19.dv: from H6638 (צָבָה) in the sense of prominence;

19.gl: Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity

also אֵיכָה ; and אֵיכָכָה ; prolonged from H335 (אַי);

20.kj: apple (of the eye), branch, company, daughter, [idiom] first, [idiom] old, [phrase] owl, town, village.

20.gl: properly, separate by awall, i.e. outside, outdoors
20.kj: abroad, field, forth, highway, more, out(-side, -ward), street, without.
20.dv: or (shortened) חֻץ; (both forms feminine in the plural) from an unused root meaning to sever;

20.gl: probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome
20.kj: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.

20.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
20.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

20.gl: properly, to be fresh, i.e. full (rosy, (figuratively) cheerful); to announce (glad news)

21.gl: properly, failure, i.e. nothing or destruction; usually (with preposition) without, not yet, because not, as long as, etc.

21.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
21.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
21.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

21.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
21.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

champion, chief, [idiom] excel, giant, man, mighty (man, one), strong (man), valiant man.

22.gl: fat, whether literally or figuratively; hence, the richest or choice part
